fake-answer:pack_snap_1:
The Context Runtime core targets deterministic project memory, precise
indexing, hybrid retrieval, source-backed ContextPack objects, typed tool and
model steps, verification, and replayable traces.

Nearest PoC path: PostgreSQL + pgvector for dense vectors, PostgreSQL metadata
for durable project/source/chunk/lineage rows, local filesystem artifacts, and
fake model/tool adapters until measured need.|
This file is ingested by Chunk 12 end-to-end proof. It mirrors the public
README focus: project-scoped memory, hybrid retrieval, ContextPack evidence,
and replayable traces without becoming a chat product.|Token spans must preserve original surfaces. Lemma/wordform expansions are
adapter-owned and must appear in retrieval contributions and query-expansion
trace events without replacing source text.|
